context: Tests whether the ios-accessibility guidance is applied to a realistic SwiftUI shopping cart with custom controls, gesture-only behavior, modal presentation, media, Dynamic Type, and motion concerns.

checklist.name: Icon labels
checklist.description: Requires meaningful labels for icon-only interactive controls, including favorite and quantity buttons.

checklist.name: Trait accuracy
checklist.description: Mentions correct accessibility traits or real controls for custom controls without putting control types into labels.

checklist.name: Row grouping
checklist.description: Recommends grouping row content or otherwise reducing excessive VoiceOver and Switch Control scan stops.

checklist.name: Gesture alternatives
checklist.description: Provides custom accessibility actions or visible/menu alternatives for swipe-to-delete, long-press, or gesture-only behavior.

checklist.name: Voice Control
checklist.description: Requires unique, speakable Voice Control labels and mentions checking visible targets with Show Names and Show Numbers.

checklist.name: Input labels
checklist.description: Uses or recommends `accessibilityInputLabels` for long or awkward spoken labels.

checklist.name: Focus restoration
checklist.description: Requires returning accessibility focus to the checkout trigger when the sheet is dismissed.

checklist.name: Image handling
checklist.description: Distinguishes decorative product imagery from content images that need useful descriptions.

checklist.name: Dynamic Type
checklist.description: Covers Dynamic Type with system text styles, scalable metrics, and adaptive layouts rather than fixed font sizes.

checklist.name: Reduced Motion
checklist.description: Requires respecting Reduce Motion for cart, row, and checkout animations.
